Brian Tanaka Mutsetsa

Software Developer | Robotics Instructor | Future AI Engineer

View My Work

About Me

I am a technology professional driven by one core mission: building intelligent systems that solve real business and societal problems.

My journey began in IT systems and infrastructure support, where I developed hands-on experience in troubleshooting, enterprise software implementation, and process optimization. Over time, this expanded into software engineering, data analytics, robotics education, and digital transformation initiatives.

Today, I operate at the intersection of technology, business systems, education, and innovation—designing solutions that improve efficiency, automate workflows, and turn raw operational data into actionable intelligence.

My long-term vision is to transition into Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence Engineering, where I can build scalable intelligent systems for Africa and beyond.

Certifications & Job Simulations

British Airways Data Science

Scraped and analyzed customer review data, then built a predictive model to understand factors influencing buying behavior.

Work Experience

IT Technician & Robotics Instructor

Robokorda Zimbabwe | Oct 2025 - Present

  • Delivered robotics, coding, and STEM education to students, strengthening technical and analytical thinking.
  • Supported the implementation of an ERP system for organizational KPI tracking.
  • Diagnosed, repaired, and maintained IT infrastructure and learning environments.

Website Designer Intern

UM Designs Creative Agency | Jan 2023 - Jul 2023

  • Delivered custom WordPress websites tailored to client business needs, including e-commerce functionality.
  • Conducted data analysis to optimize website performance and user experience.
  • Managed multiple projects, ensuring quality, timely delivery, and robust technical configurations.

IT Attachée

National Railways of Zimbabwe (NRZ) | Sep 2022 - Dec 2022

  • Diagnosed and repaired critical hardware systems to reduce operational downtime.
  • Configured shared network printers and supported internal connectivity.
  • Conducted remote troubleshooting across distributed locations to support business continuity.
